pages.raw_text:
The Spokane Traction Co. will
ask that the city work on Wash
ington st. be held up, as the grade,
which Is feet higher than was
agreed, will! make 1t impossible for
the company to run its Occur
d'Alene cars through the Washing
ton st. viaduct. The ultimate re-
suit will probably be that the
Northern Pacific railroad, builder
of the viaduct, will be compelled to
install different style Orders than
are now used


At a meeting some months ago
between officials of the city, the
railroad and the Traction Co., it
was agreed to construct the street
grade so that clearance of 15R
feet be left under the viaduct. The
railroad submitted it's plans but
made mistake between the equa-
ton of its grade and the citys, ac-
cording to Engineer Mcintyre. The
clearance under the viaduct, if the
city finishes the street grade, will
be only 1914 feet, to allow the pas
sage of the Occur d'Alene cars. 9th
ers can pass, but the Traction Co.
wants to be in a position to run it's
lake cars through the viaduct in
case anything should happen to the
regular line
